results.question: How has the reporting of threats to validity evolved over time?
results.raw_model_output:
```sparql
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

# id: threats-to-validity-over-time
SELECT ?year
       (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?paper_count)
       (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper_with_threats) AS ?papers_reporting_threats)
       ((xsd:decimal(COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper_with_threats)) / xsd:decimal(COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper))) AS ?reporting_share)
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;
         orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .

  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc r

results.question: What types of threats to validity do the authors report?
results.raw_model_output:
```sparql
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

# id: threats-to-validity-types-reported
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel ?threat_type
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel .
  ?contribution orkgp:P39099 ?threats .

  {
    ?threats orkgp:P55037 ?value .
    BIND("construct validity" AS ?threat_type)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?threats orkgp:P55035 ?value .
    BIND("internal validity" AS ?threat_type)
results.extracted_query:

WHERE {

  ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel .
  ?contribution orkgp:P39099 ?threats .

  {
    ?threats orkgp:P55037 ?value .
    BIND("construct validity" AS ?threat_type)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?threats orkgp:P55035 ?value .
    BIND("internal validity" AS ?threat_type)

PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel ?threat_type
WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel .
  ?contribution orkgp:P39099 ?threats .

  {
    ?threats orkgp:P55037 ?value .
    BIND("construct validity" AS ?threat_type)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?threats orkgp:P55035 ?value .
    BIND("internal validity" AS ?threat_type)
